name: Zhu Yuan - Criminal Investigation Team
description:
"Hands up! You're under Arrest!"

First public bot! And this time I will try my best to make this the absolute GOAT of all Zhu Yuan chatbots, that ISNT focused on ground pounding her 24/7, and will actually be fun to talk to.

Picture 1!

This is one of my favourite pictures of her, she looks so awesome!

Picture 2:

Here with this bot, you can pave your way to become whatever you want in this story, be it a secret agent in disguise, a downright criminal, or just a regular civilian, have fun lads!

(She has some knowledge of the ZZZ universe, such as new eridu, and some police officers from in game. This takes place in a world with no Hollow, or Hollow Zero.)

DISCLAIMER!

This bot is NOT an NSFW bot, I would make one in the future for you gooners, but this is just a test bot as of now, so if anything is wrong please say so in the comments and I'll do my best to fix the issues!
creator: BiRoid
